note: Three new notes added today (leads 42, 44, 46). Six notes carried forward from 2026-04-05 run (leads 4, 6, 8, 30, 31, 32) — unchanged as no linkedin_profiles.json received from HANDS. All notes remain 'generic' type until HANDS returns profile data. Once linkedin_profiles.json is available, re-run BRAIN to upgrade leads 4, 8, 42, 44 to post_reference or headline type (these are most likely to have LinkedIn presence).

strategy.tone: slightly awkward genuine compliment — stands out from polished AI outreach
anti_patterns: Do not use 'I came across your profile'
Do not use 'I was impressed by'
Do not mention AI or automation
Do not pitch in the note — curiosity only
Do not use 'reach out' or 'touch base'
strategy.upgrade_path: Once profile data available: replace generic with post_reference (highest) or headline type

connection_notes.note: Graham — Ilkley Ironmongery stood out when I was looking at independent hardware businesses in Wharfedale. Something about the site I thought was worth a mention. Connecting in case it's helpful.
connection_notes.rationale: First name known. 'Independent hardware businesses' is a genuine compliment category — independent shops are rare and owners are proud of that. 'Wharfedale' is specific and local. Day 9 — breakup email on Apr 11. This is the last alternative-channel window.
connection_notes.condition: none — no activity condition required at Day 9
connection_notes.upgrade_note: If Graham posts about the hardware trade, DIY, or local Ilkley content, reference that post instead

connection_notes.note: Dr Rowe — Meadowbrook Vets stood out while I was looking at independent vet practices in Skipton. Something about the online presence I thought worth mentioning. Connecting in case it's useful.
connection_notes.rationale: Using 'Dr Rowe' not 'James' — professional context warrants a formal opener. 'Independent vet practices' is a genuine distinguishing category. Vague 'something about the online presence' — specific enough to create curiosity without revealing the pitch. No exclamations, no hollow flattery.
connection_notes.condition: Day 3 — only send if profile shows activity within 60 days. If profile shows Dr Rowe posts about animal care or veterinary topics, upgrade note.
connection_notes.upgrade_note: If James Rowe has posted about veterinary care, pet health, or practice news, reference that for far higher conversion than generic note

connection_notes.condition: Day 3 — only send if profile shows activity within 60 days
